summary: Backend API testing completed successfully. All 42 tests passed covering auth, rooms CRUD, applications workflow, students CRUD, complaints, payments, CSV exports, and room allocation logic.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All MongoDB _id fields are properly excluded from responses
JWT auth with httpOnly cookies is correctly implemented
Room allocation logic correctly handles bed increments/decrements
Merit-based room suggestion (>=80%->2 Seater, >=60%->3 Seater, else->4 Seater) works correctly
Auto-reject for >2 backlogs is implemented correctly

test_credentials.student: Created dynamically via application approval - credentials returned in approve response

seed_data_creation: Tests use TEST_ prefix for all created data. 8 demo rooms seeded on startup (101, 102, 201, 202, 203, 301, 302, 303)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_hostel_api.py covers: admin/student auth, rooms CRUD, applications (submit, status check, approve with room allocation, reject, override room type), students CRUD with bed allocation/deallocation, complaints (create, list, update status), payments with fees_status update, CSV exports. Room allocation increments occupied_beds correctly, deletion deallocates beds. Merit logic and backlog auto-reject verified.
